description: Picks up AgentWorkforce/cloud issues labeled `complex`, posts a handoff to Slack #proj-cloud (relayfile writeback), claims the issue with a comment (relayfile writeback), then spawns the cloud-complex-issue-workflow MULTI-STAGE workflow inside the persona sandbox (plan via claude → implement via codex → review via claude → bounded repair → open-pr) to draft a PR whose body carries the plan and the review verdict.

SLACK_CHANNEL.description: Slack channel name to post handoff messages to.
